title: 5 things every AI agent harness needs
summary: Google Cloud Tech outlines five critical components required for a functional AI agent harness. The video distinguishes between AI model capabilities and the infrastructure needed to operationalize agents into production systems.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech lays out five components it considers essential to a working AI agent harness, the infrastructure layer that turns a model into a deployable agent. The framing separates raw model capability from what it takes to operationalize agents in production systems, including edge deployment. The takeaway is a checklist of the supporting pieces an agent needs beyond the model itself.
